notes:
Exhaustive i18n coverage + Swift v2 beta preview bundled:
- 5 locales (en/zh/ko/ja/es) now cover every page, tab, menu, and setting — 964 keys total, all interpolation placeholders preserved, no orphaned English in Chat Settings / Session Settings / Session Config Form / API Dashboard / Endpoint List / Sidebar / Setup / Input / Reasoning / Message List / Session Dashboard / Session Card.
- Main-process i18n bridge: the Electron tray menu, system dialogs, and downloads window title now localize alongside the UI picker via an IPC channel (`i18n:set-locale`) + DB persistence, so the tray is in 中文/한국어/日本語/Español the moment you pick it.
- Defensive t() contract: never throws under any circumstance (try/catch at every layer, falls back English → raw key). localStorage/DB key collisions audited — `vmlx-locale` is namespaced separately from existing `vmlx-theme` / `vmlx-dismissed-update` keys; DB `locale` row does not collide with existing `gateway_*` / `tray_*` / `ui_zoom_factor` rows.
- Regression guard test `panel/tests/i18n-consistency.test.ts` locks 6 invariants: valid JSON, key-set parity across locales, interpolation placeholder preservation, no empty values, LOCALES array-vs-files sync, localStorage persistence contract.
- Swift v2 beta bundled inside the DMG as `vMLX 2 (beta).app` alongside `vMLX.app`. Ships the §358 batch (commit 6ed59e4): CORS restart-required warning, gateway auto-bump on port collision, persistent gateway-status pill in tray, duplicate-model-name banner, model library user-dir path canonicalization, discovery toast with modality counts, honest scaffold-status image-gen error, swift-jinja vendor state. Drag either app to /Applications.

Credits — thanks to Sándor Dobi (@SandorDobi) for PR #99 (feat: lm-evaluation-harness network compatibility for vMLX server) — the OpenAI-compatible logprobs / top_logprobs work that §347 (remote tokenizer HTTP routes) and §352 (legacy /v1/completions logprobs wire) built on top of.
